rule_text: Any supporting image or visual sits to the right of the text block in the CTA section in a two-column layout. If there is no visual, the CTA section is just left-aligned, stretching to the full column.
intent: Standardize the CTA section as left-aligned text with any supporting visual placed on the right.
summary: In the CTA section, visuals appear right of text in two-column layout; without visuals, text is left-aligned, full-width.
